zh.lifeSummary: 當James Rankin於1595年出生在蘇格蘭金洛-爾時，他的父親Andrew Moodie Rankin25歲，母親Margaret Patoun or Paterson30歲。他於1618年4月18日與Marion Lindsay Steedman在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1667年7月22日在英國蘇格蘭金洛-爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯金洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: Rankin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: from Middle English Ran(d)kin, a diminutive of Ran(d), a pet form of the personal name Ran(d)ulf. See Rand , Randolph , Randall . This name was brought to Northern Ireland (Derry) from Scotland in the 17th century.

variants.name: Rand
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rand, a pet form of Randolf. Compare Randolph , Randall , Randy , and see also Rance .
English: habitational name from Rand (Lincolnshire), Rand Grange (North Yorkshire), or Raunds (Northamptonshire), all of which derive from Old English rand ‘edge, border, rim’.
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rand ‘rim (of a shield)’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Rankins
meanings: English (London): variant of Rankin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rank
meanings: English: nickname for a powerfully built man or someone of violent emotions, from Middle English rank ‘proud, headstrong, stout-hearted’ (Old English ranc ‘proud, rebellious’).
English: from a Middle English personal name Ranke, a back-formation from the diminutive Rankin .
South German: variant of   Rang   2. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Rankin was born in 1595, in Kinross-shire, Scotland, his father, Andrew Moodie Rankin, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Patoun or Paterson, was 30. He married Marion Lindsay Steedman on 18 April 1618, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 July 1667, in Kinross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Kinross, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Marion Lindsay Steedman le 18 avril 1618, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1667, à Kinross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Kinross, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Kinross, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, Un: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 킨로스
ko.lifeSummary: James Rankin(이)가 1595년 스컷랜드 킨로스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Moodie Rankin(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Patoun or Paterson(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1618년 4월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Marion Lindsay Steedman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1667년 7월 22일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨로스-실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 킨로스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Rankin родился в 1595 г. в местности кинросс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Andrew Moodie Rankin было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Patoun or Paterson, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Lindsay Steedman 18 апреля 1618 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 июля 1667 г. в местности кинросс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности кинросс, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
